bottom_line: S04 burned 5 fix cycles and 13 runs because its own prompt referenced a non-existent directory path (ai-dev/work/ instead of ai-dev/active/), causing the reviewer to generate false scope-creep findings and the agent to delete the wrong directory. Fixing that path in the S04 prompt template is the single highest-leverage change.
coverage_notes: Read S01-S05, S07-S13 reports in full (ai-dev/active/CR-00082/reports/). Read all 5 S04 fix-cycle logs and 1 S07 fix-cycle log. Read S01 run1.log (full), S02 run1/2/4 logs (run3 missing; 1+2 empty), S03 run1.log (full), S04 run1/3/11/12/13 logs (sampled others), S05 run1.log (full), S06 run1/2 logs (full), S07 fix1.log (full). S10 log (429KB) read tail -200 for error patterns; S11 log (439KB) tail -100; S12 log (82KB) tail -100 (no errors found). DB telemetry: full via iw item-status --json. Fix-cycle prompts read for all 6 fix cycles.

findings.title: S04 reviewer prompt contains wrong design-doc path causing 5 fix cycles and 13 runs
findings.recommendation: Fix the design-doc path in the S04 prompt template from 'ai-dev/work/<ID>/' to 'ai-dev/active/<ID>/'. Add a verification step that aborts with a clear error if the design doc is not found at the stated path, rather than proceeding with a guessed path that generates cascading false findings.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00082/prompts/CR_00082_S04_CodeReview_prompt.md:10 — 'ai-dev/work/CR-00082/CR_00082_CR_Design.md' (path does not exist; correct path is ai-dev/active/CR-00082/CR_00082_CR_Design.md)
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix1.log — agent 'Restored out-of-scope deleted file' (acted on false positive scope-creep finding)
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix3.log — agent 'Deleted untracked directory ai-dev/work/CR-00082/' (wrong directory; does not exist as standard path; correct is ai-dev/active/CR-00082/)
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix4.log — 'ai-dev/active/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_S01_Backend_report.md was missing' (still misinterpreting scope after 3 cycles)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Fix design-doc path in S04 prompt template: replace 'ai-dev/work/<ID>/<ID>_CR_Design.md' with 'ai-dev/active/<ID>/<ID>_CR_Design.md' and add a path-existence check before proceeding; analyzed in CR-00082 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/. Effort: S.

findings.title: Assertion scanner flags pytest.fail() without bare assert as violation, forcing awkward workaround
findings.recommendation: Update ruff-assertions / custom assertion scanner to treat pytest.fail() as an implicit assertion for the no-assert rule, OR document in skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md that visual-regression test functions MUST include a bare assert (even if redundant) to satisfy the scanner.
evidence: ai-dev/active/CR-00082/fix-cycles/CR_00082_S07_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md — 'ruff-assertions flagged no-assert on both visual-regression test functions — they contained pytest.fail() branches but no bare assert statement'
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S07_fix1.log:1 — 'Added assert diff_fraction <= __MAX_DIFF_FRACTION__ after the pytest.fail() block' (artificial assert added just to satisfy scanner)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add pytest.fail() as an implicit assertion for ruff-assertions' no-assert rule in pyproject.toml, or document the bare-assert requirement in skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md; analyzed in CR-00082 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_self_assess_report.md). Target: pyproject.toml or skills/iw-ai-core-testing/SKILL.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S03 prompt does not verify CI workflow install command uses --all-groups for dev dependencies
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit instruction in the S03 prompt: 'Verify the CI workflow's install command uses --all-groups (not just --frozen) so that [dependency-groups].dev dependencies are installed. Match the install pattern from existing CI workflows (e.g., .github/workflows/quality.yml).'
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix4.log — '.github/workflows/visual-regression.yml — Changed install command: uv sync --frozen → uv sync --all-groups --frozen' (caught in S04 fix cycle 4; would have skipped Pillow + pixelmatch in CI)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add --all-groups verification to S03 prompt: CI workflow install command must use 'uv sync --all-groups --frozen' to install [dependency-groups].dev deps; analyzed in CR-00082 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/. Effort: S.

findings.title: S02 produced 2 empty run logs before succeeding — potential silent executor/logging failure
findings.recommendation: Investigate why S02_run1.log and S02_run2.log are 0 bytes. Likely causes: (a) agent process killed/exited before writing completion output to log, (b) executor crashed or timed out before logging started, (c) log-write buffering issue. If reproducible, it's a platform issue in the executor/logging path. If one-off, document as transient.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/ — '0 CR-00082_S02_run1.log', '0 CR-00082_S02_run2.log' (empty logs from 2 early S02 attempts; run4 is the documented success)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate empty run logs in executor: S02_run1.log and S02_run2.log are 0 bytes (agent may have been killed before writing log); analyzed in CR-00082 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_self_assess_report.md). Target: executor/. Effort: M.

findings.title: S04 fix-cycle prompt allows reviewer to re-flag the same false-positive findings across consecutive cycles
findings.recommendation: Add a 'previously addressed findings' list to the fix-cycle prompt so the reviewer skips re-checking findings confirmed resolved in the prior cycle. Alternatively, add a 'converged verdict' rule: if 3 consecutive cycles flag the same finding class without new evidence, the reviewer must escalate rather than generate another fix-cycle.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix1.log — 'scope creep + Playwright token violation + dependency placement mismatch'
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix3.log — 'format-check violation, scope creep under ai-dev/work/CR-00082' (same scope-creep finding repeated verbatim after being addressed)
ai-dev/logs/CR-00082_S04_fix4.log — 'missing S01 report; CI workflow install command mismatch' (unchanged from prior cycle)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add 'previously addressed findings' tracking to S04 fix-cycle prompt to prevent re-flagging the same false-positive findings across cycles; analyzed in CR-00082 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00082/reports/CR-00082_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/. Effort: S.
